calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-04-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padillar.
Petitioners: John McComb and Gale Elston, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Matthea Ayanna McComb and Kevia Kiera Charis McComb, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Matthea Ayanna McComb-Elston and Kevia Kiera Charis McComb-Elston.
Decree signed in open court.
